== Notes for [[Item:Q88193|Q88193]] ==

'''
=Lucius Aemilius L.f. Mamercinus=
'''

Lucius Aemilius L.f. Mamercinus was a Roman statesman who served as consul in 366 and 363 BC.

'''Source : '''

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Aemilius_L.f._Mamercinus

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
